iconLineArt.$description: Line Art — detailed white outline illustration scenes. Source: src/assets/icons/line-art/. Used for feature highlights, empty states, marketing moments.

color.$description: Line art color roles — applied via currentColor on the SVG

default.$description: White — original design color, use on dark backgrounds

brand.$description: Brand blue — use on light backgrounds

subtle.$description: Muted gray — de-emphasized or disabled state

container.$description: Optional dark background container for line art display

background.$description: Deep navy — matches the dark bg line art is designed for
